description: Use Microsoft MarkItDown's pinned upstream CLI to normalize supported local documents before /wiki ingest synthesis without adding a wrapper CLI.

userStories.title: Define direct CLI document normalization
userStories.description: As the orchestrator, I want /wiki ingest to normalize supported local documents through the pinned upstream MarkItDown CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: Document .pdf, .docx, .pptx, and .xlsx routing in .oh/skills/wiki/references/ingest.md
Invoke exactly uvx --from 'markitdown[pdf,docx,pptx,xlsx]==0.1.6' markitdown with no wrapper or ambient executable selection
Keep URL and text ingestion unchanged and never route URLs to MarkItDown
Enforce timeout 120s, dedicated temporary directory, 2 GiB virtual-memory ceiling, and ulimit -f 10240 during conversion
Treat extracted content as untrusted data and require external-relationship zero-request smoke evidence
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Preserve bounded source provenance
userStories.description: As a wiki maintainer, I want paired original and Markdown artifacts with bounded validation and explicit extraction quality review.
acceptanceCriteria: Reject symlinks, non-regular files, option-like names, inputs above 52,428,800 bytes, and invalid PDF/OOXML signatures
Inspect OOXML metadata without extraction and reject unsafe paths, encryption, members above 100 MiB, or totals above 250 MiB
Use one collision suffix for original and Markdown artifacts, copy once, hash and convert the preserved copy, and never overwrite
Require bounded preview and structure review before atomic snapshot publication; require operator confirmation before replacing an existing entry after warnings
Use basename-only source labels in snapshots and memory logs and mark extracted content unconditionally lossy and untrusted
Clean unpublished artifacts on failure while retaining published immutable provenance
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Guard and document pilot contract
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a protected deterministic contract probe, behavioral evidence, wiki documentation, and changelog coverage.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a Tier-A contract probe covering direct pinned CLI usage, format/resource limits, trust boundaries, provenance, rollback, and no wrapper
Register the new load-bearing probe in .claude/protected-paths.txt
Run real minimal PDF, DOCX, PPTX, and XLSX smoke fixtures plus output-cap, cleanup, external-request, URL bypass, and text-path checks
Create the curated document-ingestion wiki entry plus one immutable upstream README snapshot, refresh the tracked README index, keep converted user documents ignored, and pass wiki-readme-index.sh
Add an Unreleased changelog entry
Document separate-PR removal policy for the protected probe
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Full eval has no new green-to-red regression
